    15	import { CommentBlockGutter } from './CommentBlockGutter'
    16	import type { CommentAnchor } from './types'
    17	
    18	type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
    19	type CommentsQueryData = InfiniteData<
    20	  PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>
    21	>
    22	
    23	function useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    24	  const { data } = useQuery({
    25	    queryKey: ['comments', refId, 'anchors'],
    26	    queryFn: async () => {
    27	      const data = await apiClient.comment.proxy
    28	        .ref(refId)
    29	        .get<PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>>({
    30	          params: { hasAnchor: 'true', size: 50 },
    31	        })
    32	
    33	      return data
    34	    },
    35	  })
    36	
    37	  return useMemo(() => {
    38	    if (!data) return []
    39	    return data.data
    40	  }, [data])
    41	}
    42	
    43	function useCachedCommentsData(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    44	  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    45	  const queryKey = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
    46	  const queryCache = queryClient.getQueryCache()
    47	
    48	  const data = useSyncExternalStore(
    49	    (onStoreChange) => {
    50	      const unsubscribe = queryCache.subscribe((event) => {
    51	        if (
    52	          event.type === 'updated' &&
    53	          event.query.queryHash === JSON.stringify(queryKey)
    54	        ) {
    55	          onStoreChange()
    56	        }
    57	      })
    58	      return unsubscribe
    59	    },
    60	    () => queryClient.getQueryData<CommentsQueryData>(queryKey),
    61	    () => null as CommentsQueryData | null,
    62	  )
    63	
    64	  return useMemo(() => {
    65	    if (!data) return []
    66	    return data.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data)
    67	  }, [data])
    68	}
    69	
    70	function useMergedAnchorComments(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    71	  const eagerComments = useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId)
    72	  const cachedComments = useCachedCommentsData(refId)
    73	
    74	  return useMemo(() => {
    75	    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor>()
    76	    for (const c of eagerComments) map.set(c.id, c)
    77	    for (const c of cachedComments) {
    78	      if ((c as CommentWithAnchor).anchor) map.set(c.id, c)
    79	    }
    80	    return [...map.values()]
    81	  }, [eagerComments, cachedComments])
    82	}
    83	
    84	export function LexicalCommentWrapper({
    85	  content,
    86	  refId,
    87	  title,
    88	  children,
    89	}: PropsWithChildren<{
    90	  content: string

    92	  title: string
    93	}>) {
    94	  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    95	  const blockInfos = useMemo<BlockInfo[]>(
    96	    () => extractBlockInfos(content),
    97	    [content],
    98	  )
    99	
   100	  const comments = useMergedAnchorComments(refId)
   101	
   102	  return (
   103	    <div ref={containerRef} className="group/comment-block relative">
   104	      {children}
   105	      <CommentBlockGutter
   106	        containerRef={containerRef}
   107	        blockInfos={blockInfos}
   108	        comments={comments}
   109	        refId={refId}
   110	        title={title}
   111	      />
   112	      <CommentAnchorHighlight
   113	        containerRef={containerRef}
   114	        blockInfos={blockInfos}
   115	        comments={comments}
   116	      />
   117	    </div>
   118	  )
   119	}

    10	
    11	export function computeBlockFingerprint(text: string): string {
    12	  const input = text.slice(0, 200) + String(text.length)
    13	  let hash = 5381
    14	  for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i++) {
    15	    hash = ((hash << 5) + hash + (input.codePointAt(i) ?? 0)) | 0
    16	  }
    17	  return (hash >>> 0).toString(16)
    18	}
    19	
    20	function getNodeType(node: Record<string, any>): string {
    21	  return node.type as string
    22	}
    23	
    24	function getTextContent(node: Record<string, any>): string {
    25	  if (typeof node.text === 'string') return node.text
    26	  if (node.type === 'linebreak') return '\n'
    27	  if (Array.isArray(node.children)) {
    28	    return (node.children as Record<string, any>[]).map(getTextContent).join('')
    29	  }
    30	  return ''
    31	}
    32	
    33	export function extractBlockInfos(content: string): BlockInfo[] {
    34	  let parsed: Record<string, any>
    35	  try {
    36	    parsed = JSON.parse(content)
    37	  } catch {
    38	    return []
    39	  }
    40	
    41	  const rootChildren = parsed.root?.children as
    42	    | Record<string, any>[]
    43	    | undefined
    44	  if (!rootChildren) return []
    45	
    46	  return rootChildren.map((child, index) => {
    47	    const blockId = (child.$ as Record<string, any> | undefined)?.blockId as
    48	      | string
    49	      | undefined
    50	    const textContent = getTextContent(child)
    51	    return {
    52	      index,
    53	      blockId: blockId || '',
    54	      type: getNodeType(child),
    55	      textContent,
    56	      fingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(textContent),
    57	    }
    58	  })
    59	}

    61	export function findBlockIndex(

    65	  const { children } = contentEl

    67	  while (current && current !== contentEl) {
    68	    if (current.parentNode === contentEl) {
    69	      for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
    70	        if (children[i] === current) return i

    72	      return -1

    19	export const CommentBoxRoot: Component<CommentBaseProps> = (props) => {

    53	            ) : (
    54	              <CommentBoxWithAuth autoFocus={autoFocus} />

    56	          </div>

diff --git a/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx b/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..ea170d1a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,119 @@
+'use client'
+
+import type { CommentModel, PaginateResult } from '@mx-space/api-client'
+import type { InfiniteData } from '@tanstack/react-query'
+import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
+import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
+import { useMemo, useRef, useSyncExternalStore } from 'react'
+
+import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
+import { buildCommentsQueryKey } from '~/queries/keys'
+
+import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
+import { extractBlockInfos } from './anchor-utils'
+import { CommentAnchorHighlight } from './CommentAnchorHighlight'
+import { CommentBlockGutter } from './CommentBlockGutter'
+import type { CommentAnchor } from './types'
+
+type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
+type CommentsQueryData = InfiniteData<
+  PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>
+>
+
+function useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
+  const { data } = useQuery({
+    queryKey: ['comments', refId, 'anchors'],
+    queryFn: async () => {
+      const data = await apiClient.comment.proxy
+        .ref(refId)
+        .get<PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>>({
+          params: { hasAnchor: 'true', size: 50 },
+        })
+
+      return data
+    },
+  })
+
+  return useMemo(() => {
+    if (!data) return []
+    return data.data
+  }, [data])
+}
+
+function useCachedCommentsData(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
+  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
+  const queryKey = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
+  const queryCache = queryClient.getQueryCache()
+
+  const data = useSyncExternalStore(
+    (onStoreChange) => {
+      const unsubscribe = queryCache.subscribe((event) => {
+        if (
+          event.type === 'updated' &&
+          event.query.queryHash === JSON.stringify(queryKey)
+        ) {
+          onStoreChange()
+        }
+      })
+      return unsubscribe
+    },
+    () => queryClient.getQueryData<CommentsQueryData>(queryKey),
+    () => null as CommentsQueryData | null,
+  )
+
+  return useMemo(() => {
+    if (!data) return []
+    return data.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data)
+  }, [data])
+}
+
+function useMergedAnchorComments(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
+  const eagerComments = useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId)
+  const cachedComments = useCachedCommentsData(refId)
+
+  return useMemo(() => {
+    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor>()
+    for (const c of eagerComments) map.set(c.id, c)
+    for (const c of cachedComments) {
+      if ((c as CommentWithAnchor).anchor) map.set(c.id, c)
+    }
+    return [...map.values()]
+  }, [eagerComments, cachedComments])
+}
+
+export function LexicalCommentWrapper({
+  content,
+  refId,
+  title,
+  children,
+}: PropsWithChildren<{
+  content: string
+  refId: string
+  title: string
+}>) {
+  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
+  const blockInfos = useMemo<BlockInfo[]>(
+    () => extractBlockInfos(content),
+    [content],
+  )
+
+  const comments = useMergedAnchorComments(refId)
+
+  return (
+    <div ref={containerRef} className="group/comment-block relative">
+      {children}
+      <CommentBlockGutter
+        containerRef={containerRef}
+        blockInfos={blockInfos}
+        comments={comments}
+        refId={refId}
+        title={title}
+      />
+      <CommentAnchorHighlight
+        containerRef={containerRef}
+        blockInfos={blockInfos}
+        comments={comments}
+      />
+    </div>
+  )
+}

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-27 16:43:56Z)**_

1. **High: Anchor gutter/highlight data can go stale for non-thread updates**  
   The new anchor UI is driven by a separate query key `['comments', refId, 'anchors']` in [LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx:25](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx:25).  
   In the reviewed files, I only see this key invalidated after submit inside [CommentBlockThread.tsx:66](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockThread.tsx:66).  
   Result: anchor gutter/highlights can miss updates from other creation paths or realtime events unless this key is also invalidated there.

2. **Medium: Hard cap of 50 anchored comments (no pagination)**  
   The fetch in [LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx:30](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx:30) requests `size: 50` and does not paginate.  
   If a ref has more than 50 anchored comments, older anchors won’t appear in the gutter/highlight.

3. **Medium: Cache subscription is brittle and may miss some state transitions**  
   `useCachedCommentsData` filters cache events by `event.type === 'updated'` and `queryHash === JSON.stringify(queryKey)` in [LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx:50](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx:50).  
   This relies on internal hash shape and ignores non-`updated` events (`added`/`removed`), which can lead to missed refreshes in some cache lifecycle paths.

4. **Low: Dead prop/API surface**  
   `title` is required in [CommentBlockGutter.tsx:21](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockGutter.tsx:21) and passed from [LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx:110](<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx:110), but it is not used inside `CommentBlockGutter`.  
   This is minor, but it adds noise and confusion to the component contract.

Assumption: I reviewed current working-tree content for the four files (including untracked new files) and did not run runtime tests/typecheck in this pass.
